invariant: STEP 0.1 (R-MW-2, D28) — on workstream branch, run git fetch origin + git merge origin/main --ff-only; conflict/non-ff → HALT. A runner that skips STEP 0.1 proceeds without reconciling, silently advancing on a stale/unreconciled tree.
owning_role: prompts/_orchestrator.md STEP 0.1 — Run git fetch origin && git merge origin/main --ff-only. Non-fast-forward or conflict → HALT.
seed: Apply defect: STEP 0.1 block removed from orchestrator (skip fetch+merge entirely)
Run against scenario-conflict-halt state (non-fast-forward merge would fire)
Expected: orchestrator proceeds to frontier-scan without reconcile HALT
load_bearing_assertion: Golden orchestrator: HALT with 'Merge conflict or non-fast-forward against origin/main...' emitted. Defect orchestrator: no HALT — skips reconcile, proceeds to frontier-scan. Value-parity fails: step_0_1_halt == false vs golden true.
expected_verdict: value-parity FAIL — no-auto-reconcile: orchestrator skips reconcile HALT on non-fast-forward
separates_from_golden_by: HALT message presence + step_0_1_halt flag. Golden: HALT fires on non-fast-forward. Defect: no HALT, proceeds on unreconciled tree.
